DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensit.description: Deletes a sensitivity group and its levels.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.description: Lists sensitivity groups configured for the account.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.summary: Retrieve all sensitivity groups in an account

GET /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.description: Gets a sensitivity group and its levels.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.description: Gets the current order of sensitivity levels in a group.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

result.description:
The ordered list of level IDs for a sensitivity group.
Used to get and set the ordering of levels independently of level attributes.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.summary: Retrieve the ordered list of level IDs for a sensitivity group.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitiv.description: Creates a sensitivity group, optionally from a template.

levels.description: Levels to create with the group. Mutually exclusive with `template_id`.

requestBody.description: Attributes of the new sensitivity group.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.description: Updates a sensitivity group and its levels.

levels.description:
The desired final state of levels.
- `None` (omitted): no level changes.
- `Some([])`: delete all levels.
- `Some([...])`: desired final set + order.

id.description:
If `None` (omitted), a new level will be created. Otherwise, an existing level will
be updated.

requestBody.description: Attributes of the sensitivity group to update.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.summary: Update the attributes of a single sensitivity group.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.description: Updates the order of sensitivity levels in a group.

schema.description:
The ordered list of level IDs for a sensitivity group.
Used to get and set the ordering of levels independently of level attributes.

requestBody.description: Desired ordered list of level IDs.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

result.description:
The ordered list of level IDs for a sensitivity group.
Used to get and set the ordering of levels independently of level attributes.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/dlp/sensitivi.summary: Set the ordering of levels within a sensitivity group.
